title: pyrrosia laevis
intro: Pyrrosia laevis, also known as the smooth rhinophyllum or smooth shield fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrrosia laevis include its ability to improve blood circulation, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea or infusions, and it can also be used topically as an ointment or salve to treat skin irritations and wounds.
